name: Boston Brown Bread
recipeIngredient: 5 cups graham or whole wheat flour
sour milk to make a dough as for muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients together.
2. Grease 1 pound coffee cans or baking powder cans.
3. Fill the cans about 2/3 full with the batter.
4. Steam for 3 to 4 hours.
5. After steaming, gently shake the contents of the cans and place them in a warm oven to dry for a few minutes.
6. Add raisins if desired.
7. Serve hot with butter.
